entities.name: Skills/mentor-escalation/scripts/va_client.py
entities.context: The script file created for VA Client functionality

relationships.context: The API key is used to authenticate with the va.zo.computer service
The requests library is used to interact with the va.zo.computer API
The argparse library is used for command-line argument parsing
The json library is used to handle JSON data
The os library is used to access environment variables
The sys library is used to manipulate Python runtime environment
The time library is used for sleep intervals and measuring time
The uuid library is used for generating unique IDs
The datetime library is used for handling time information
The subprocess library is used to install missing dependencies
The script file itself implements the VA client functionality
